intended_use_full: The Cardiologs Holter Platform is intended for use by qualified healthcare professionals for the assessment of arrhythmias using ECG data in the adult and pediatric population. The product supports downloading and analyzing data recorded in compatible formats from any device used for the arrhythmia diagnostics such as Holter, event recorder, 12 lead ambulatory ECG devices, or other similar devices indicated for recording heart rhythm. The Cardiologs Holter Platform provides ECG signal processing and analysis, QRS and Ventricular Ectopic Beat detection, QRS feature extraction, interval measurement, heart rate measurement and rhythm analysis.
